session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:
## Summary
**PR #9019**: Convert `erk launch` to `@no_repo_required` with `--repo` flag
### Changes Made
**New file: `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/types.py`** - `RemotePRInfo` - frozen dataclass with PR-specific fields (head_ref_name, base_ref_name) from the pulls endpoint - `RemotePRNotFound` - sentinel for missing PRs
**Modified: `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/abc.py`** - Added abstract `get_pr()` method returning `RemotePRInfo | RemotePRNotFound`
**Modified: `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/real.py`** - Implemented `get_pr()` using `GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{number}` - Added `_parse_pr_response()` helper
**Modified: `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/fake.py`** - Added `prs` constructor parameter and `get_pr()` implementation
**Modified: `src/erk/cli/commands/launch_cmd.py`** - Added `@repo_option` decorator and `target_repo` parameter - Added `is_remote` branching: `--repo` flag or `NoRepoSentinel` routes to remote handlers - Added remote dispatch handlers for all 5 workflows (pr-rebase, pr-address, pr-rewrite, learn, one-shot) - Added `_dispatch_workflow_remote()` helper using `RemoteGitHub.dispatch_workflow()` - Added `_launch_remote()` orchestrator
**New file: `tests/commands/launch/test_launch_remote_paths.py`** - 20 tests covering all remote workflows, error cases, model/ref threading, and edge cases
### CI Results - **ruff**: clean - **ty**: passes - **pytest**: 39/39 launch tests pass (19 existing + 20 new)
